case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. LAUREN HERRERA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,306.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT HERRERA, LAUREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF IS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH SPOHN--INVESTIGATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERRERA, LAUREN $1,306.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,306.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
